categories.name: أشراط الساعة من سورة التكوير
categories.nameEn: Signs of the Hour from Surah At-Takwir

items.verseEn: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
And when the stars fall, dispersing,
And when the mountains are removed
And when full-term she-camels are neglected
And the producers of sparks [when] striking
Arriving thereby in the center collectively,

categories.name: آدَابُ الْخِطَابِ مَعَ النَّبِيِّ فِي سُورَةِ الْحُجُرَاتِ
categories.nameEn: Etiquettes of Addressing the Prophet in Surah Al-Hujurat

items.verse: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تُقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىِ ٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌ عَلِيمٌۭ
items.verseEn: O you who have believed, do not put [yourselves] before Allāh and His Messenger but fear Allāh. Indeed, Allāh is Hearing and Knowing.

items.verse: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَرْفَعُوٓا۟ أَصْوَٰتَكُمْ فَوْقَ صَوْتِ ٱلنَّبِىِّ وَلَا تَجْهَرُوا۟ لَهُۥ بِٱلْقَوْلِ كَجَهْرِ بَعْضِكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ أَن تَحْبَطَ أَعْمَـٰلُكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَشْعُرُونَ
items.verseEn: O you who have believed, do not raise your voices above the voice of the Prophet or be loud to him in speech like the loudness of some of you to others, lest your deeds become worthless while you perceive not.

items.verse: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَغُضُّونَ أَصْوَٰتَهُمْ عِندَ رَسُولِ ٱللَّهِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱمْتَحَنَ ٱللَّهُ قُلُوبَهُمْ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ ۚ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌۭ وَأَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ
items.verseEn: Indeed, those who lower their voices before the Messenger of Allāh - they are the ones whose hearts Allāh has tested for righteousness. For them is forgiveness and great reward.

items.verse: وَلَوْ أَنَّهُمْ صَبَرُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ تَخْرُجَ إِلَيْهِمْ لَكَانَ خَيْرًۭا لَّهُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌۭ رَّحِيمٌۭ
items.verseEn: And if they had been patient until you [could] come out to them, it would have been better for them. But Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

items.verse: وَٱقْتُلُوهُمْ حَيْثُ ثَقِفْتُمُوهُمْ وَأَخْرِجُوهُم مِّنْ حَيْثُ أَخْرَجُوكُمْ ۚ وَٱلْفِتْنَةُ أَشَدُّ مِنَ ٱلْقَتْلِ ۚ وَلَا تُقَـٰتِلُوهُمْ عِندَ ٱلْمَسْجِدِ ٱلْحَرَامِ حَتَّىٰ يُقَـٰتِلُوكُمْ فِيهِ ۖ فَإِن قَـٰتَلُوكُمْ فَٱقْتُلُوهُمْ ۗ كَذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ
items.verseEn: And kill them [in battle] wherever you overtake them and expel them from wherever they have expelled you, and fitnah is worse than killing. And do not fight them at al-Masjid al-Ḥarām until they fight you there. But if they fight you, then kill them. Such is the recompense of the disbelievers.

items.verse: وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۖ فَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ صَدَقُوا۟ وَلَيَعْلَمَنَّ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ
items.verseEn: But We have certainly tried those before them, and Allāh will surely make evident those who are truthful, and He will surely make evident the liars.
Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].

items.verse: أَوَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَنَّهُمْ يُفْتَنُونَ فِى كُلِّ عَامٍۢ مَّرَّةً أَوْ مَرَّتَيْنِ ثُمَّ لَا يَتُوبُونَ وَلَا هُمْ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
items.verseEn: Do they not see that they are tried every year once or twice but then they do not repent nor do they remember?

harf.hint: To Him belongs everything that exists
harf.arabicVerse: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًۭا
harf.verse: 73:8 - And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.

deduction.title: The Herald of an Unprecedented Sin
deduction.intro: Some stories in the Quran reveal the depth of corruption an entire society can fall into. This messenger stood alone, pleading with a people drowned in a perversion that no nation before them had ever pursued. Despite years of warning, hearts remained hardened, and the divine decree arrived in a most terrifying manner. Can you identify this noble messenger of Allah?
clues: I was sent as a warner to a people consumed by a perversion that no nation before them had ever committed.
My people called me a liar and threatened to expel my followers and me from the land.
Honored visitors came to my home in the form of striking young men, and I felt deep distress for their safety.
My people demanded I surrender my guests to them, unaware that these visitors were angels sent by Allah.
My own spouse did not share in my faith and chose to remain behind with the doomed.
I was saved with my daughters at dawn, as a devastating rain of stones fell and our cities were overturned.

identity.label: Who Am I?
options: Prophet Lut
Prophet Shu'aib
Prophet Hud
Prophet Nuh
Prophet Salih

trial.label: Trial/Event
options: A great flood engulfing the earth
Loss of eyesight from long suffering
A tyrant claiming divinity
Being thrown into a blazing fire
Being demanded to surrender honored guests
trial.answer: Being demanded to surrender honored guests

location.label: Key Element
options: A great ark built by hand
A staff that split the sea
A miraculous she-camel
A blazing fire
Overturned cities

outcome.label: Outcome
options: Drowned while pursuing the believers
Saved from a furnace of fire unharmed
Lifted up to the heavens alive
Family perished in a great flood
Family saved except for an unfaithful wife
outcome.answer: Family saved except for an unfaithful wife

deduction.arabic: فَمَا وَجَدْنَا فِيهَا غَيْرَ بَيْتٍۢ مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ
deduction.verse: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims. (51:36)

scramble.hint: A reminder that wealth and loved ones are a trial and test from Allah, who holds an immense reward for the patient.
scramble.arabic: وَٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّمَآ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌۭ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عِندَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌۭ
scramble.verseEn: And know that your properties and your children are but a trial and that Allāh has with Him a great reward.
